hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && printf '[%s] wrote: %s\n' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" "$f" >> './memory/session-log.md'; } 2>/dev/null || true

CONVFILE="./memory/conversations/$(date '+%Y-%m-%d').md"; SENTINEL="/tmp/claude-stop-$(date '+%Y-%m-%d')"; if [ -f "$CONVFILE" ] || [ -f "$SENTINEL" ]; then exit 0; fi; touch "$SENTINEL"; printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"Stop","additionalContext":"IMPORTANT: The session is ending. Please now write the conversation summary following CLAUDE.md Stop hook instructions: (1) write to memory/conversations/%s.md, (2) append one line to memory/conversations/index.md, (3) append session block to memory/session-log.md."}}' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d')"; exit 2
